title: Quantum Tycoon, an educational video game for discovering quantum computing
why:
- Quantum Tycoon is an educational app released to make quantum computing accessible to the general public in an interactive and entertaining way.
- The app allows users to manage a quantum computer company, develop technology, and complete tasks using real quantum algorithms such as Grover’s algorithm.
- It introduces key concepts of quantum technologies through a simulation and strategy game environment while maintaining playability.
- The project was developed by students and researchers from the University of Barcelona’s Institute of Cosmos Sciences and Institute of Nanoscience and Nanotechnology.
- Quantum Tycoon can be downloaded for free on Google Play.
